reason:
The diff correctly implements the `streamHeader` option feature with legitimate test assertions that verify real behavior.

The tests use a `fetchSpy` to intercept actual fetch calls and verify that the correct headers are being sent based on the `streamHeader` option value. The assertions check the real headers object (`init.headers`) against the actual values sent by the implementation, not against mocked/hard-coded values. The tests also verify that the queries execute successfully and return correct results, confirming the feature works end-to-end with real server communication.
